description_long: This object is a Fender Frontman 25R guitar amplifier, featuring a rectangular black cabinet with a textured vinyl covering and a sturdy handle on top. The front face displays a woven silver-gray speaker grille, adorned with a metallic Fender logo on the upper left. Above the grille, a black control panel houses five round silver knobs and a rectangular power switch, providing tactile control for volume and tone adjustments. The rear panel is labeled with the model name 'Frontman 25R' in white script and has an open section for ventilation and access to the speaker. The sides and top are solid, with a single screw visible on one side, and the overall build suggests a combination of wood, metal, and plastic materials. This amplifier is compact yet robust, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, music venues, or street performances.
description: A compact black Fender Frontman 25R guitar amplifier with a textured exterior, silver control knobs, and a woven speaker grille featuring the Fender logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woven speaker grille, Fender logo, five control knobs, and power switch.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the textured black surface and a single screw, with the top handle partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the 'Frontman 25R' model label, open ventilation section, and solid black panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain textured black surface and the top handle visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A metallic Fender script logo is visible on the upper left of the front speaker grille.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grille features a tightly woven, crisscross mesh pattern in silver-gray, providing both protection and a classic aesthetic.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located above the speaker grille and consists of five round silver knobs arranged in a horizontal row, with a rectangular power switch on the far right.
